items.message: No action needed: Analyzed CI check runs across the 25 most recent commits on main. The HEAD commit (4d8cb2f) has 84 check runs with 0 failures. While some older commits show CI pipeline failures (in build/packaging scripts), every failing pipeline reports 0 unit test failures — tests all pass. No `(Build UnitTest ...)` jobs have failed. CI is green from a unit-test perspective; no GitHub issue is warranted.
